title: NYC Public Advocate — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Public Advocate (Office of the Public Advocate) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the Worst Landlord Watchlist (landlordwatchlist.com/api/landlords), the self-hosted advocate.nyc.gov site, and the City Council Legistar system where the PA's sponsored legislation lives. Includes the NYC geography spine (community board, council district, census tract, NTA, BBL/BIN) used to locate watchlist buildings and complaints, and a reference to any of the city agencies the ombudsman intervenes with.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine — the join keys back to the rest of city government, used to place a watchlist building or a complaint.

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code.

communityDistrict.description: Alias of communityBoard for datasets using 'COMMUNITY DISTRICT'.

AgencyReference.description: A reference to a NYC agency the Public Advocate oversees or intervenes with on a resident's behalf.

agency.description: Agency name (e.g. 'Department of Housing Preservation and Development').

ComplaintCategory.description: Subject area of a 'help with a city agency' ombudsman complaint.
